Name: -1_good_the_they_and
Representative_Docs: ['To mean it means that the someone being referred to makes or usually for the most part things which are very good in terms of quality or appearance.  In reality though it effectively usually means that the person who is being referred to makes choices usually aligned with mine.  A person who has good taste may also be someone who consistently chooses things which are just generally popular overall.', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together. ', 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me. ']

Name: 0_taste_good_to_that
Representative_Docs: ['If someone has a good taste, then they like things that many people view are "good". It\'s a very subjective thing to have a "good taste", I think it depends on how you grew up. In certain areas, it\'d be luxury things or elegant things that are defined as good taste. In other parts, it could just be like something that isn\'t as "Trendy" as what most people like. I\'d also say that people with "good taste", tend to think on their own and don\'t follow what others like.', 'Personally, someone who has good taste means that the taste they have aligns with my knowledge of what a good taste is. To put simply, what I judge to be good taste is good taste to me.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_they_or_the_that
Representative_Docs: ["What I mean by that is they have a taste similar to mine or one I can appreciate. People who enjoy the same type of books or movies or art.  Though I can understand someone may have exceptional taste and I don't agree with it.  Such as enjoying Rothko's art or Wharton's novels.  ", 'The things they like are aesthetically pleasing. They understand how things go together. And they typically do not offend people with the choices they make.', 'I think that their taste is similar to mine and shows that they like high quality things. I also think that they can see the finer things in life and can appreciate them. ']

Name: 2_means_or_it_that
Representative_Docs: ['I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.', 'To me it means that someone has good taste and clothing like the way that they dressed Or it could mean that someone has good taste as far as a woman in the pic of a man', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists. "]
